title: Ansible Segment 11
summary: A large development segment of Ansible core covering 303 PRs across 17 dependency layers. Changes span nearly every subsystem: package manager modules (dnf, dnf5, apt, apt_repository), user/file/cron modules, strategy and executor improvements, CLI tools (ansible-doc, ansible-config, ansible-galaxy, ansible-pull), plugin framework (action, connection, filter, lookup, shell), module_utils (basic, facts, validation), playbook parsing, variable management, Galaxy collection tooling, configuration system overhaul, CI pipeline updates, and packaging/release automation.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: A large development segment of Ansible core covering 303 PRs across 17 dependency layers. Changes span nearly every subsystem: package manager modules (dnf, dnf5, apt, apt_repository), user/file/cron modules, strategy and executor improvements, CLI tools (ansible-doc, ansible-config, ansible-galaxy, ansible-pull), plugin framework (action, connection, filter, lookup, shell), module_utils (basic, facts, validation), playbook parsing, variable management, Galaxy collection tooling, configuration system overhaul, CI pipeline updates, and packaging/release automation.

nodes.label: Ansible Modules
nodes.description: Core built-in modules including dnf, dnf5, apt, apt_repository, user, file, find, cron, copy, unarchive, iptables, git, uri, hostname, package_facts, service_facts, systemd_service, replace, get_url, expect. Heavily modified with 113 PRs touching this area for bug fixes, new features, and refactoring.

nodes.label: Module Utilities
nodes.description: Shared utility libraries for modules including basic.py (21 PRs), facts/hardware collection (especially linux.py), common validation, compat layers, csharp/powershell utilities, and distro detection. Provides the foundation that modules build upon.

nodes.label: Plugin Framework (Misc)
nodes.description: Plugin subsystems not covered by more specific categories: inventory plugins (script, ini, yaml), callback plugins, shell plugins, become plugins, and cache plugins. Includes plugin loader and shared plugin infrastructure.

nodes.label: CLI Tools
nodes.description: Command-line interface tools: ansible-doc (12 PRs for rendering, color, paragraph formatting), ansible-config (6 PRs for validation, INI dedup), ansible-galaxy (6 PRs for collection install, role symlinks), ansible-pull, and base CLI init.

nodes.label: Playbook Engine
nodes.description: Playbook parsing and representation: base.py (field attributes, validation), task.py, play.py, role handling, block processing, and handler management. Touched by 30 PRs for attribute fixes, role loading, and play iteration.

nodes.label: Galaxy Collection Management
nodes.description: Galaxy collection install, dependency resolution, API communication, and collection artifact management. Includes galaxy role/data scaffolding (39 files in galaxy/data). Touched by PRs for install fixes, verification, and signatures.

nodes.label: Connection Plugins
nodes.description: SSH, paramiko, psrp, winrm, and local connection plugins. PRs address SSH keepalive, reconnection handling, persistent connection cleanup, and transport layer improvements.

nodes.label: Core Utilities
nodes.description: Shared utilities: display.py (10 PRs for verbosity, color, logging), sentinel, unsafe_proxy, jsonify, and miscellaneous helpers used across the codebase.

nodes.label: Task Executor
nodes.description: Task execution pipeline: task_executor.py (13 PRs), play_iterator.py (6 PRs), module_common.py, powershell bootstrap. Manages task dispatch, result handling, and module invocation across local and remote targets.

nodes.label: Action Plugins
nodes.description: Action plugin base class (__init__.py, 8 PRs) and specific action plugins for copy, fetch, script, raw, reboot, wait_for_connection, dnf, yum. Mediates between the executor and connection/module layers.

nodes.label: Parsing & Argument Processing
nodes.description: Module argument parsing (mod_args.py, 8 PRs), YAML loading/dumping, data loader, vault encryption, and splitter utilities. Handles playbook and task argument interpretation.

nodes.label: Configuration System
nodes.description: Configuration management: base.yml (21 PRs for new settings, defaults), manager.py (11 PRs for INI parsing, validation, env var handling), and runtime configuration for builtin modules.

nodes.label: Filter Plugins
nodes.description: Jinja2 filter plugins: core.py and YAML documentation for password_hash, union, and other filters. PRs add new filter documentation, fix type coercion, and update plugin metadata.

nodes.label: Strategy Plugins
nodes.description: Execution strategy: __init__.py (13 PRs), linear.py (7 PRs), free.py (5 PRs). Controls play execution order, handler flushing, fork management, and host-failure accounting.

nodes.label: Variable Management
nodes.description: Variable manager (6 PRs for precedence, merge behavior), host variables, reserved variables, clean/unsafe variable handling, and variable plugins.

nodes.label: CI/CD Infrastructure
nodes.description: Azure Pipelines configuration, test container definitions, and CI scripts. PRs update test images, add platform coverage, and maintain pipeline health.

nodes.label: Developer Tooling
nodes.description: Developer scripts, ticket stubs, sanity requirement updates, backport helpers, and test-module utilities. Supports the development and release workflow.

nodes.label: Lookup Plugins
nodes.description: Lookup plugins: csvfile, ini, password, sequence, and base class. PRs fix delimiter handling, error reporting, and add documentation improvements.

nodes.label: Templating Engine
nodes.description: Jinja2 templating integration, template variables, and native Python type handling. Core of Ansible's variable interpolation system.

nodes.label: Packaging & Release
nodes.description: Release automation scripts (release.py, 7 PRs), version bumping, and distribution packaging support.

edges.label: modules import shared utilities from module_utils
executor invokes action plugins for task dispatch
action plugins use connection plugins for remote execution
strategy plugins orchestrate executor task runs
playbook engine uses parsing for task arguments
executor resolves variables through var manager
variable manager uses templating for interpolation
ansible-galaxy CLI drives galaxy collection operations
inventory and callback plugins use module_utils
strategy reads playbook structure for execution order
CI pipelines invoke packaging and release scripts
